scores.correctness_notes: All required sections present and correct: service with override/command/startup/environment/on-check-failure, HTTP check with level/period/timeout/threshold/url, log target with type/location/services/labels. Matches gold standard structure well.
scores.hallucination_notes: backoff-delay, backoff-factor, backoff-limit are not standard Pebble layer YAML fields — these appear to be invented parameters. Pebble does not support these fields in layer configuration.
